```{python}
# %%
# Read in libraries
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from lets_plot import *
LetsPlot.setup_html(isolated_frame=True)
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn import metrics
df = pd.read_csv("https://github.com/byuidatascience/data4dwellings/raw/master/data-raw/dwellings_ml/dwellings_ml.csv")
```

```{python}
# target variable
y = df['before1980']

# features
X = df.drop(columns=['before1980'])

# train/test split
x_train, x_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    X,
    y,
    test_size=.34,
    random_state=76
)

# average of first 10 testing y values
avg_first10 = y_test.head(10).mean()

print(avg_first10)
```

```{python}
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split

# Define features and target
X = df.drop(columns=['before1980'])
y = df['before1980']

# Split the data
X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    X,
    y,
    test_size=.34,
    random_state=76
)

# Average of the first 10 training sprice values
avg_sprice = X_train['sprice'].head(10).mean()

print(avg_sprice)
```
